name: nmap-formatter
desc: A tool that allows you to convert NMAP results to html, csv, json, markdown, graphviz (dot), sqlite, excel and d2-lang. Simply put it's nmap converter.
descFull: A tool that allows you to convert NMAP results to html, csv, json, markdown, graphviz (dot), sqlite, excel and d2-lang. Simply put it's nmap converter.
